s: Manage Your DigitalOcean Infrastructure with OceanNex
d:
A powerful native Android app to control your DigitalOcean droplets, domains, managed databases, firewalls, volumes and more...

Features

- Multiple accounts support - Theme to blend with your system UI (dynamic colors) - Biometric support for security - Set your default home screen - Change to your native language, if available - Dashboard to view all important info - Create and view droplets - View all events - View and create firewalls - Manage domains with records - Reboot, rebuild, delete, destroy, rename, reset password of droplet and more.. - Enable and manage droplet backups - Manage droplet snapshots - View regions, OS images and marketplace apps, plans and sizes - View and create VPCs - Manage and create your certificates - Add and manage your uptime checks - View, manage, add, delete managed cluster databases - Add and remove users and databases for a database cluster - View billing info, invoices and recent history - Download invoices as PDF - Create and manage your projects - and many more...

Complete list of features: https://codeberg.org/swatian/OceanNex/wiki/Features

Source code: https://codeberg.org/swatian/OceanNex

Developer: https://mastodon.social/@mmarif
